testcase.name: TC_LGN_003_loginWithValidCredentials

failure.message: User is NOT logged in after valid credentials. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: User is NOT logged in after valid credentials. expected [true] but found [false] at tests.LoginTest.TC_LGN_003_loginWithValidCredentials(LoginTest.java:70) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:539) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:264) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1136) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:635) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:833) ... Removed 16 stack frames

testcase.name: TC_LGN_004_verifyLoggedInUsername

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //a[contains(text(),' Logged in as')]' (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //a[contains(text(),' Logged in as')]' (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at base.BasePage.waitForVisible(BasePage.java:113) at base.BasePage.getText(BasePage.java:80) at Logged in as')]"} (Session info: chrome=149.0.7827.54) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception
